nodes.name: BootstrapperAgent
nodes.description: Parent node for configuring agent that orchestrage provioning and communicate status to Device Preparation page.

children.name: ExecutionContext
children.description: This node holds opaque data that will be passed to the Bootstrapper Agent as a parameter when it is invoked to execute.

nodes.name: IsPostOobeProvisioningAllowed
nodes.description: This node determines whether Autopilot Device Preparation provisioning can be executed after OOBE has completed.

enum.description: Autopilot Device Preparation provisioning is only allowed during OOBE.
Autopilot Device Preparation provisioning is only allowed post-OOBE.

nodes.name: MDMProvider
nodes.description: Parent node for configuring the MDM provider that interacts with the BootstrapperAgent.

children.name: MdmAgentInstalled
children.description: This node indicates whether the mdm agent was installed or not. When set to true sets the AUTOPILOT_MDM_AGENT_REGISTERED WNF event.

children.name: Progress
children.description: Node for reporting progress status as opaque data. Contract for data is between the server and EMM agent that reads the data.

children.name: RebootRequired
children.description: This node indicates whether an MDM policy was provisioned that requires a reboot.

nodes.name: PageEnabled
nodes.description: This node determines whether to show the Device Preparation page during OOBE.

nodes.name: PageErrorCode
nodes.description: This node provides specific overall HRESULT causing a fatal error on the Device Preparation page.  This node is valid only if the PageErrorPhase node's value is not Unknown.

nodes.name: PageErrorDetails
nodes.description: This node provides optional details for any fatal error on the Device Preparation page.  This node is valid only if the PageErrorPhase node's value is not Unknown, but not all errors will have details.

nodes.name: PageErrorPhase
nodes.description: This node provides the specific phase that failed during the Device Preparation page.  Values are an enum: 0 = Unknown; 1 = AgentDownload;  2 = AgentProgress.

nodes.name: PageSettings
nodes.description: This node configures the Device Preparation page settings.

nodes.name: PageStatus
nodes.description: This node provides status of the Device Preparation page.
